findings.evidence: `rg` shows `code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/DifferentialSupportCardinality.lean:64:theorem card_univ_offDiag_fin :` with conclusion `((Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).offDiag).card = n * (n - 1)`, while Mathlib already has the generic `Finset.offDiag_card` used in the proof.
findings.fix: Make this helper private/local, inline `Finset.offDiag_card`, or move/rename it under the appropriate `Finset`/generic namespace such as `Finset.card_offDiag_univ_fin`.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.GridState.card_univ_offDiag_fin` is not a `GridState` API: its statement is only about `((Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).offDiag).card`, so the namespace/name misplaces a generic finite-set cardinality lemma.

summary: One public helper is introduced under the wrong namespace; the rest of the introduced names and notation are acceptable from this angle.
